title: crocanthemum occidentale
intro: Crocanthemum occidentale, also known as Rocky Mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Crocanthemum occidentale include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
